<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar\DataCollector; /** * DataCollector Interface */ interface DataCollectorInterface { /** * Called by the DebugBar when data needs to be collected * * @return array Collected data */ function collect(); /** * Returns the unique name of the collector * * @return string */ function getName(); }
